council_waiver_reason: S18 P0 = pre-authorized closeout of S17 P0 (push-gated commit + §13.9 LOCKED amend deferred to post-push success). PDR + Council deliberation completed in S17 Round 1 (Grok-DISRUPTOR + Gemini-AUDITOR). User explicit 'go push' = unlock_source=user. No new scope. Micro tier (1 doc edit + operational push/verify).

priorities.title: S17 P0 push-gate resolution: ship 7-commit S17 queue (fd016c2..f73bc3a) + bind spark-online.space custom domain via gh api + enforce HTTPS + apply §13.9 LOCKED amendment (pre-authorized S17 P0 PDR).
priorities.check_method: (1) User confirmed Squarespace DNS migration: Squarespace Defaults preset deleted (4 A records 198.x.x.x + CNAME www ext-sq.squarespace.com + HTTPS @ removed) + 5 custom records added (4 A records @ 185.199.108-111.153 TTL 1hr + CNAME www daneshto-dotcom.github.io. TTL 4hr default). (2) nslookup spark-online.space @8.8.8.8 → 4 GitHub IPs only (zero Squarespace leftover). (3) git push origin master shipped 7 commits fd016c2..f73bc3a (c6f636d P0 custom-domain prep + 629044a P1 Sever + 91e1e21 P2 multi-color + e12d3ce P3 closeout + f996bd2/267de16/14a9d05 autocommit/handoff). (4) GH Actions deploy run 25741967555 'Deploy to GitHub Pages' completed success. (5) gh api -X PUT repos/daneshto-dotcom/the-spark/pages -F cname=spark-online.space bound custom domain (initial cname:null → cname:spark-online.space). (6) Let's Encrypt cert auto-issued ~30s later: https_certificate.state=approved, domains=[spark-online.space, www.spark-online.space], expires_at=2026-08-10. (7) gh api -F https_enforced=true flipped HTTPS enforcement. (8) curl -sI https://spark-online.space/ → HTTP 200 OK with HTML <title>SPARK</title>; asset /assets/index-DLe4m4Zo.js → 200 OK 385KB. (9) github.io fallback now 301-redirects to http://spark-online.space/ confirming custom-domain binding at Pages level. (10) HTTP-80 still 404 (GH propagation lag 1-2h, non-blocking since browsers default HTTPS). (11) LOCKED_DECISIONS.md §13.9 amended: 'S17+, deferred' → 'S18 P0 SHIPPED 2026-05-12'; added cert metadata, DNS config details, gh api commands, fallback URL redirect note. Commit f09e452.
